meedum.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Thavazhnthidum Thangapoove expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Veera Sivaji, the song highlights a pivotal romantic moment between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Bombay Jayashree and composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 28, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thavazhnthidum Thangapoove, the listener is taken on a romantic journey filled with heartfelt emotions. The song beautifully conveys the essence of love and longing, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments in Veera Sivaji. With its soothing melody and evocative lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This enchanting track is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the magic of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thavazhnthidum Thangapoove from Veera Sivaji is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of romance and longing. With Bombay Jayashree's enchanting vocals and D Imman's soulful composition, this song creates a magical atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Experience the beauty of love through this captivating track that beautifully intertwines emotion and melody.
stanzaMeanings: The precious flower that blooms in the garden brings forth magical dreams under the moonlight.
Crossing the threshold of the house, you have come to join hands, stories can be told in your presence.
In the calmness, I am lost, in my heart, I find you.
In your beautiful eyes, my dreams exist; without you, there are no dawns.
Crossing the threshold of the house, you have come to join hands, stories can be told in your presence.
At times, you may get angry, but then you smile and create magic.
With small little things, you make me shine.
You beautifully cover my work with your grace.
I will listen to all the words that bring joy.
She has taken my hand, and I will enjoy the world.
Your words are a song for me; you are my support, my mother.
You create injustice; you will take away the sleep that follows.
You are the divine that comes and gives.
I am the one who sees the colors of the world.
When the time of my death comes, if I see your blooming face, it will be a rebirth.
In the eyes, tears will flow; without you, the days will be lonely.
The precious flower that blooms in the garden brings forth magical dreams under the moonlight.
In the calmness, I am lost, in my heart, I find you.
In your beautiful eyes, my dreams exist; without you, there are no dawns.
